✨ A little love note for you ✨

Happy Birthday
My Love Shekhar ❤️

🌸

Today the universe smiles because you were born into it — and I smile because somehow, beautifully, you chose me.

— a love letter —

Words From My Heart

My dearest Shekhar, on this beautiful day I want you to know how deeply, truly, and completely you have changed the colour of my world. Before you, life was lovely — but with you, it is extraordinary.

You are the calm in my storm, the laughter in my silence, and the warmest reason I look forward to every single morning. Your eyes hold universes I could spend lifetimes exploring, and your smile — oh, your smile — it undoes me every single time.

Happy Birthday, love. May this year bring you every joy your heart has ever quietly wished for. You deserve the whole sky.

— forever yours 💕
— because love is also laughing —

Us, In a Nutshell 🌰

😤

"I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right."
— us, constantly

🍕

We can never agree on what to eat, but somehow we always end up sharing everything.

📱

You're the only person I don't roll my eyes at when you text "lol" to something that is clearly not funny.

😴

You snore like a tiny storm and still somehow look adorable. I don't understand it either.

🐱

You pretend to be tough, but you turned into a puddle the first time you held a kitten. I saw.

💸

We said "just one more episode" at 11 PM. It is now 3 AM. This is your fault. I love you.

— frozen in time —
